title: Wind turbines, Wind farm, Wind energy, Mirny, Crimea
description: Wind turbines. Wind farm. Wind energy. Donuzlav wind farm is located near the towns of Novoozernoe and Mirny. The installed capacity is 19+ MW. It consists of 150+ USW 56-100 windmills with a rated output of 100+ kW. Mirny, Crimea.
author: Vyacheslav Argenberg
attribution_md:
Wind turbines, Wind farm, Wind energy, Mirny, Crimea
Wind turbines. Wind farm. Wind energy. Donuzlav wind farm is located near the towns of Novoozernoe and Mirny. The installed capacity is 19+ MW. It consists of 150+ USW 56-100 windmills with a rated output of 100+ kW. Mirny, Crimea.
